branding.name: RetailIQ
branding.persona: The 'Night Market' Architect - sophisticated, data-driven, yet visually electric.
branding.emotional_archetype: ARCHETYPE 7: ELECTRIC & NEON (Tailored for Business Intelligence)
branding.visual_mood: Cinematic Data. Think 'Minority Report' meets 'High-End Streetwear Store'.

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H6. Tracking tight (-0.02em).

mono.usage: KPI values, order IDs, code snippets, inventory counts.

spacing.philosophy: Generous breathing room. If you think it's enough, double it.

grid_system.dashboard: Bento Grid (Dense). Grid cols 4. Use col-span-2 for major charts.
grid_system.marketing: Tetris Grid (Asymmetric). Grid cols 12. Mix wide and tall blocks.

cards.style: Glass-morphism Lite. bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/5

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:scale-105 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium border border-zinc-700 hover:bg-zinc-800 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-zinc-950/50 border-zinc-800 focus:border-primary/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary/50 rounded-xl h-12

charts.style: Minimal axes, gradient fills, custom tooltips (dark glass).

visual_enhancers.gradients: Use subtle radial gradients behind hero images or key stats.
visual_enhancers.motion: Framer Motion. Staggered entrance for lists. Spring transitions for hover.

assets.map_placeholder: Use a dark mode map style (Google Maps Dark Mode JSON) or a stylized static image for mockups.

landing_page.vibe: High energy, dark futuristic, scroll-triggered animations.

dashboard.vibe: Command Center. High data density but clear hierarchy.

customer_store.layout: Grid of Product Cards. Large Hero Banner. Slide-out Cart.
customer_store.vibe: Immersive Shopping. Focus on product imagery.

tech_instructions.framework: React (Create React App or Vite - JS based on file analysis)

universal_guidelines: Do not get biased or lean towards generic examples.
Fusion over Imitation: Mix 3+ design references.
Emotion First: Every design decision maps to a feeling.
Content is king: Tell a story.
Zoom in: Use close-ups and bold focus.
Negative Space: Value the empty areas.
Contrast: Use light vs. dark, rough vs. smooth.
Avoid: Purple/Teal for CTA (Use Violet/Indigo instead).
Avoid: Inter everywhere (Use Outfit for headings).
Interactive Elements: Must have hover/focus states.
Data-TestID: All interactive elements must have data-testid.
